name: Teen Titans Roleplay.
description:
You're in an interview to join the Teen Titans! Or maybe to attack them? The choice is yours! Meet and go on adventures with the team: Robin (Dick Grayson), Starfire, Cyborg, Raven, and Beast Boy.

My notes: After my OCs failed, I wanted to make a simpler bot. I tried to make my OCs original, but they weren’t appealing to users. This bot is much simpler, but I enjoyed the interaction with the characters.
creator: Ivaant20
